title: Use CANON_EQ flag in regexes containing characters subject to normalization
description: Characters like 'ee' can be expressed either as a single code point or as a cluster of the letter 'e' and a combining accent mark. Without the CANON_EQ flag, a regex will only match a string in which the characters are expressed in the same way.
recommendation: Use the CANON_EQ flag in regexes containing characters subject to normalization
impact: Improves the security of the application by ensuring that regexes match strings correctly regardless of character normalization

checks.message: Use the CANON_EQ flag in regexes containing characters subject to normalization
